architecture.summary: Add isFrameworkPluginPath() with regex ^plugins/specweave[^/]*/skills/, unified shouldRejectSkillPath() wrapper, both exported. Strictly skills/ subdir only.

integrations.summary: N/A - no external integrations, internal filter function only

performance.summary: N/A - regex check on short strings, negligible impact

security.summary: Defense-in-depth: filter at all call sites. SpecWeave-specific regex only, no broad patterns to avoid false positives.

edge-cases.summary: DB cleanup: soft-reject submissions, hard-delete Skill rows. No KV cleanup needed. Crawl-worker: add to all 4 JS files.
